Package glide.api.models.commands

Class SortOptions

  • java.lang.Object
    • glide.api.models.commands.SortBaseOptions
      • glide.api.models.commands.SortOptions
  • public class SortOptions
extends SortBaseOptions
    Optional arguments to GenericBaseCommands.sort(String, SortOptions), GenericBaseCommands.sortReadOnly(String, SortOptions), and GenericBaseCommands.sortStore(String, String, SortOptions)
    See Also:
    valkey.io and valkey.io

    • Field Detail

      • BY_COMMAND_STRING

        public static final java.lang.String BY_COMMAND_STRING
        BY subcommand string to include in the SORT and SORT_RO commands. Supported in cluster mode since Valkey version 8.0 and above.
        See Also:
        Constant Field Values

      • GET_COMMAND_STRING

        public static final java.lang.String GET_COMMAND_STRING
        GET subcommand string to include in the SORT and SORT_RO commands. Supported in cluster mode since Valkey version 8.0 and above.
        See Also:
        Constant Field Values

      • toArgs

        public java.lang.String[] toArgs()
        Creates the arguments to be used in SORT and SORT_RO commands.
        Overrides:
        toArgs in class SortBaseOptions
        Returns:
        a String array that holds the sub commands and their arguments.
